ListNat.natId: The ID of the specified NAT to query
ListNat.name: The name of the specified NAT to query
ListNat.ip: The EIP bound to the specified NAT to query
ListNat.marker: The starting position for paginated list queries, a system-generated string
ListNat.maxKeys: The maximum number of items per page, not exceeding 1000. Default value is 1000
